qwen3-8b.notes: Solid generalist with clean format compliance. No standout weakness, no standout strength either.

qwen2.5-coder-7b.notes: Code-specialist; holds up at classification but hard-task drop is noticeable. Slower than peers of similar size.

gemma4-e4b.notes: Only multimodal model in the registry (vision + audio). mlx-lm 0.31.3 incompatible (issue #1242) — use mlx-vlm backend.

gemma3-12b-qat.notes: Top of the leaderboard. Slowest non-reasoning model and tight on 16 GB — close apps before running.

gemma3-4b-qat.notes: Good quality/size tradeoff. Was the top non-12B pick before JSON-format default; Llama 3.2 3B now leads at smaller size.

phi4-mini-reasoning.notes: Reasoning-tuned. Bad fit for classification: emits CoT instead of labels, large gap between acc and strict_acc, 10x+ slower than peers.

smollm3-3b.notes: Weak generalist; JSON-format constrained mode helps it the most of any small model on this bench.

deepseek-r1-distill-7b.notes: Reasoning distill. Same anti-pattern as phi4-mini-reasoning: <think> blocks, low format_ok, much slower than peers.

llama-3.2-3b.notes: Pareto-dominates everything except gemma3-12b-qat on this bench — 1.8 GB, fast, and the CI overlap with the 12 GB model means the gap may not be statistically real.

ministral-3-8b.notes: Dec 2025 Mistral-3, Apache 2.0. Lands in the top tier but is multiple-times slower than Llama 3.2 3B for a marginal accuracy gain — Pareto-dominated.

phi4-mini-instruct.notes: Non-reasoning Phi-4-mini. Dramatic improvement over the reasoning variant on this benchmark. Use this, not Phi-4-mini-reasoning.

nemotron-nano-9b.notes: NVIDIA Mamba-2/Transformer hybrid. Slightly leaky /think — fmt_ok below 100%. Slow inference. Not Pareto-competitive against Llama 3.2 3B.

hermes-3-llama-3.2-3b.notes: NousResearch finetune of Llama 3.2 3B. RLHF unlearned structured-output following — large gap between acc and strict_acc, format_ok collapses. Cautionary tale.

mistral-nemo-minitron-8b.notes: NVIDIA's Mistral distillation. Extremely verbose output before EOS — ~10x slower than peers. Strongly Pareto-dominated.

llama-3.1-8b.notes: Older Llama baseline. Loses to Llama 3.2 3B on both accuracy and speed on this bench — bigger is not better here.

apple-foundation.notes: Apple on-device ~3B FM via afm (brew install scouzi1966/afm/afm). Requires macOS 26.2+, Xcode 26.5+, Apple Intelligence enabled, and `afm` server running.
